fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Kalshi Settings → API Keys. Optional — public market data is accessible without auth.

healthcheck_config.description: Checks Kalshi exchange status (public endpoint, no auth required)

metadata.summary: Kalshi prediction market platform for reading markets, events, order books, and settlement data.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Create an account at kalshi.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Paste the key here (optional — public market data works without auth)
